posts.author: Chrismootral (Chris Kantrowitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Has anyone used Monday for fundraising for their startup? I see templates for non-for-profit. Fundraising? I guess we can take that template an re-work it. But I figured at some point someone would create an uber workflow for startups?

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chris,

Can’t say I’ve seen an exact template/workflow for this but generally, a CRM workflow would be the foundation and customized to your needs with specific columns and such.

If you’re looking for a fully built-out CRM workflow that’s entirely customizable, check this out. We would deploy, custom-tailor it to your needs, and then train you on the final workflow, too.
